issues_delegated.rationale: Per chapter-revision skill delegation rules: AI detectability issues (structural tells, syntactic patterns) with anti-ai audit critical/blocking marks → shenbi-anti-detect. Handling principle: anti-detect only does surface transformations (no plot/character/foreshadowing impact), chapter-revision handles structural/plot issues that require narrative content rewriting. Review summary assessed this as 0 CRITICAL (not pipeline-blocking), confirming delegation is appropriate.
issues_delegated.trigger_condition: anti-ai audit: 破折号密集使用 85处(1.47处/百字) per line => 101行命中
